_comment: Wang Family Hunting Dog (王家猎犬) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 3/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.
name: Wang Family Hunting Dog

canonical.appearance: Large hunting dog of the Wang Family village. Enhanced by proximity to Wang Lin's divine sense.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
